suite.name: Teste-Agibank

test.name: Caso de teste 02 - Pesquisar conteúdo na barra de pesquisa

kw.name: Abrir o navegador e acessar o blog
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Digitar na caixa de pesquisa o texto "Consignado"
kw.source_name: Digitar na caixa de pesquisa o texto "${Consignado}"

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Clicar no elemento com texto
Click Element
kw.msg: StaleElementReferenceException: Message: stale element reference: stale element not found (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#staleelementreferenceexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac20245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac202b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a98d7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9a4ece] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9a35d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a99640b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9941ae] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a998875] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a99893f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9e8f10] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9db06f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70aa0ff6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9da986] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70aa34818] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9d9018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9d9f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af358f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af2fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af530b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac3d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac4600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac29634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac297e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac0e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa0c907374+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa0d29cc91+21]

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.status: StaleElementReferenceException: Message: stale element reference: stale element not found (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#staleelementreferenceexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac20245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac202b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a98d7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9a4ece] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9a35d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a99640b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9941ae] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a998875] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a99893f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9e8f10] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9db06f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70aa0ff6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9da986] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70aa34818] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9d9018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9d9f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af358f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af2fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af530b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac3d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac4600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac29634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac297e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac0e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa0c907374+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa0d29cc91+21]

kw.name: Verificar se o resultado do conteudo de pesquisa é exibido "Consignado"
kw.source_name: Verificar se o resultado do conteudo de pesquisa é exibido "${Consignado}"

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Objetivo deste teste é verificar se a pesquisa está retornando resultado relevantes ao termo.
test.status: StaleElementReferenceException: Message: stale element reference: stale element not found (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#staleelementreferenceexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac20245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac202b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a98d7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9a4ece] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9a35d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a99640b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9941ae] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a998875] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a99893f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9e8f10] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9db06f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70aa0ff6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9da986] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70aa34818] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9d9018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70a9d9f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af358f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af2fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70af530b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac3d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac4600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac29634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac297e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70ac0e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa0c907374+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa0d29cc91+21]

suite.doc: Essa suite testa o acesso ao blog
